mapper.select: SELECT * FROM goods WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM goods
is_deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods (name, code, category_id, specification, unit, price, min_stock, max_stock, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{categoryId}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{price}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, category_id = #{categoryId}, specification = #{specification}, unit = #{unit}, price = #{price}, min_stock = #{minStock}, max_stock = #{maxStock}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE goods SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
